items.title: hexa AOT cache hit rate optimization (key normalize)
items.notes: Audit tool emits recommendations: strip_timestamp_from_key, canonicalize_env_vars, sort_import_order, warm_cache_in_ci. No live run on this host (project hexa runtime mismatch with public REPL); audit runs natively on H100 / project hexa.

items.title: bin reduce (strip debug symbols, unused fns)
items.notes: strip -S exercised on real Mach-O artifact (cert_gate). Selftest after strip: PASS. Delta small because base binary already partially stripped.

items.title: single-file tool packaging (hexa build -o dist/<name>)
items.notes: 3 CP1 tools packaged into dist/<name>.bin shims. an11_ensemble selftest PASS; serve_alm_persona + h100_post_launch_ingest selftest SKIP (require live deps + project hexa runtime). All shims invocable.

items.title: brew formula (bottle만 publish)
items.notes: Formula stub with placeholder bottle SHA256 (per-arch slots: arm64_sonoma, arm64_ventura, ventura, x86_64_linux). depends_on hexa runtime. post_install message lists CP1 binary names. NOT published to a tap (per constraint); requires real release artifacts before taps.

constraints_honoured: no system binary stripped (only artifact copy in dist/)
